---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Charles John Abraham"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Charles John Abraham

**Dates:** (1814-1903)

### Description

1st Bishop of Wellington, New Zealand, and later Suffragan Bishop of Derby

### Biography

He married (1850) Caroline Harriet Palmer (1809/10-1877)[ODNB, WWW]

### Letters

- Letter from April 25th 1872
- Letter from Jany 17th 1872
- Letter from Innocents\' Day [28 December 1871]
- Letter from October 3, 1868.
- Letter from Kohimarama: Dec. 21, 1859.
- Letter from Novr 24th 1858
- Letter from May 14, 1848

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
